problem.summary: Split a host-to-device, kernel, device-to-host pipeline into chunks and streams to study copy/compute overlap against a sequential baseline.
outputs: host_out[i] contains a simple transformed value from host_in[i]
constraints: Pinned host memory is required for meaningful async H2D/D2H overlap
Record whether copy engines and corocprofrrent kernels are available
No overlap claim without measured timelines or timings

verification.method: Compare sequential and chunked-stream outputs elementwise.

curation.notes: This scaffold is for system-level overlap experiments. Future records should say timing-only unless a profiler timeline or counters are attached.
